steps.title: Use same-side angles
steps.content:
Because lines $l$ and $k$ are parallel, the same-side interior angles made by transversal $t$ are supplementary. That means their measures add to $180^{\circ}$:
$$
x+y=180
$$

steps.title: Apply the given inequality
steps.content:
Solve the angle relationship for $y$:
$$
y=180-x
$$
Since $x \gt 165$, subtracting $x$ from $180$ gives a value less than $15$:
$$
y=180-x \lt 180-165=15
$$

steps.title: Match the required statement
steps.content: The statement that must be true is $y \lt 15$. The answer is A.
